title: uragoga schweinfurthii
intro: Uragoga schweinfurthii, also known as the African bitter leaf, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimalarial, and antibacterial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Uragoga schweinfurthii is often prepared for medicinal use through herbal tea or infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water.
